ModMetaData.name: Vanillafied Vivi
ModMetaData.author: KahirDragoon
ModMetaData.description:
Removes the optical changes made to the vivi and the race specific appearel and uses normal clothes and genes instead.
Content:
Race / Pawns: - Vivi pawnkind race changed to Human for full visual and mod compatibility - Removed all Vivi-specific head types and hair defs; Vivis now use vanilla heads and hair - Apparel tags updated per pawnkind: Neolithic/Medieval for civilians, MedievalMilitary for guards, Royal/RoyalTier2 for royals (requires Royalty DLC) - Combat power rebalanced for guard, firefighter, sniper, and royal pawnkinds
Xenotype (VV_Vivi): - Added vanilla genes: quick movement, heat tolerance, cold weakness, dull psychic ability, thin body type - Replaced weak melee penalty with terrible melee penalty (balance for metabolic efficiency) - Added custom genes: VVV_HoneyGatherer, VVV_CosmeticWings, VVV_CosmeticAntennae, VVV_ViviPhysiology
Custom Genes: - Honey Gatherer: bonus stats for honey and magic plant gathering - Cosmetic Wings: cosmetic wings with Vivi flight animations (visual only, no true flight) - Vivi Physiology: royal Vivi egg-laying cycle (15-day), progress bar gizmo, forces female, enables Royal Jelly need - Cream Maker: marker gene that unlocks the Vivicream production recipe - Hive Mind: disables and shortens specific thoughts
Apparel: - Removed all Vivi-specific apparel (female garments, hats, guard uniform/helmet, winter cape, guardian coat, children's wear) - Removed fake and bionic antenna/wing implants and their surgical recipes - Vivis now wear vanilla apparel (Neolithic and Medieval tags); the faction is medieval tech so consider adding a medieval clothing mod for more variety
Architect Menu / Buildings: - Moved all Vivi buildings, furniture, floors, and traps into standard vanilla architect tabs (Production, Furniture, Misc, Security, Structure, Floors) - Removed the custom VV_Bulidings architect tab - FortifyHoneycombWall designator added to both Orders and Structure menus
Faction / Culture: - VV_ViviFederation patched with proper backstory filters (settler, combat, firefighter, sniper) - Vivi culture updated to use vanilla short/long hair instead of Vivi-exclusive styles - RPEF race constraints removed from backstories and the VV_RoyalVivi hediff so they work on Human pawns
Recipes / Research: - Vivicream production gated to pawns with VVV_CreamMaker gene instead of a race check - Vivi apparel research project removed (VV_Apparels); VV_AdvancedApparels prerequisites cleared
Compatibility: - CompVivi and CompViviHolder added to the Human ThingDef so normalized Vivis can use the Everflower plant system - RPEF constraints removed from the VV_Vivi xenotype so it can be applied to Human pawns
